headings: CONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON FINAL PAYMENT
text: This Conditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Final Payment is expressly conditioned upon receipt of payment and posting of same with Supplier's financial institution in the amount of $ by Supplier from ('Subcontractor' ). This Conditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Final Payment acknowledges the complete satisfaction of, and forever waives and releases, all claims of every kind that Supplier has or may have in connection with Subcontractor, Contractor, the Project and the Property and which could be asserted against the Project, the Property, Subcontractor, Contractor, Owner, any lender on the Project and all officers, shareholders, members, managers, directors, agents and employees of any of them. Contractor is specifically relying on the foregoing in its dealings with Owner.
